hero_subtitle: SFTY Business centralizes wallet and transaction risk data from multiple providers into one workflow to structure KYT evidence aggregation and support audit-ready compliance cases.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT evidence collection depends on manual aggregation
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to unify wallet and transaction risk signals from multiple KYT providers into a single, audit-ready record. This slows case workflows and weakens traceability across wallet activity, provider outputs and regulatory requirements.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYT wallet and transaction risk signals from multiple providers into unified cases with linked evidence, decision logs and regulatory rule context to streamline compliance workflows and audit readiness.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk data and provider outputs to create structured cases that preserve evidence and support compliance review and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT data from multiple providers into structured evidence, cases and decisions, giving compliance teams clearer control and audit-ready workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with audit-ready wallet and transaction evidence, governed provider orchestration and enterprise deployment for scalable, defensible compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a connected compliance layer that connects wallet risk, transaction alerts, cases, decisions and reports into one structured workflow for effective KYT management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure KYT evidence workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals from multiple sources, applies internal rules, routes alerts for review, opens cases and records decisions with linked evidence in a controlled workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete case history, decision logs and supporting KYT evidence to support audit readiness and defensible review of wallet and transaction risk investigations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate multiple KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects outputs from various KYT and blockchain analytics providers into one compliance stack without replacing those providers, supporting consistent data flow and review.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYT or compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT, KYC and Travel Rule providers to structure outputs into workflows, but does not replace existing compliance or analytics tools.
final_title: Connect KYT evidence into compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY aggregates wallet, transaction and provider data into structured cases and audit-ready evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
